export const metadata = {
  title: "Anime Paradox Beginner Guide: Fast Progression & Best Units 2026",
  description: "Master Anime Paradox with our beginner guide for 2026. Learn fast progression, optimal unit choices, gem & gold farming strategies, and essential early-game tips.",
  category: "Guide",
  image: "https://placehold.co/800x400/007bff/fff?text=Anime+Paradox+Beginner+Guide",
  date: "2026-02-01",
  author: "Anime Paradox Wiki Team"
}

<Callout type="info" title="Quick Guide">
- **Redeem codes** immediately for a strong start and early gems.
- Prioritize summoning **Broly, Kilawa, or Cell** as your first evolved Mythic units.
- Push through **Normal and Nightmare story modes** for significant first-clear gem rewards.
- Farm **Legend Stages** for consistent gems, gold, and the easily obtainable secret unit **Ichigo**.
- Save **trait rerolls** exclusively for your best units, especially Ichigo, once acquired.
- Actively play stages to **level up units** efficiently, avoiding feeding for XP.
- Utilize **daily and weekly challenges** for crucial evolution materials and rerolls.
</Callout>

The world of Anime Paradox can be daunting for newcomers, with its intricate unit systems, diverse farming methods, and challenging game modes. To ensure you hit the ground running and avoid common pitfalls, a solid **Anime Paradox beginner guide** is essential. This comprehensive guide will walk you through the most efficient path to progression, from your very first summons to mastering early-endgame content in 2026. We'll cover everything from selecting your initial units and maximizing gem income to understanding trait rerolls and tackling advanced challenges, setting you up for success in Anime Paradox.

<Section icon={Sparkles} title="Getting Started: First Steps & Unit Selection">

Embarking on your Anime Paradox adventure begins with a few crucial steps that can significantly impact your early game. Immediately upon logging in, you should redeem any available codes for free rewards, which often include valuable gems. After that, claim any free units hidden in the lobby to give yourself a starting roster. The initial summoning phase is critical, but resist the urge to blindly spam banners. Your goal is to secure one or two powerful Mythic units that can reliably clear story content and unlock further game modes.

**Video Highlights:**
- Redeem codes for early advantages and gems.
- Prioritize story stages for initial gem income (250-500 gems per first clear).
- Aim for Broly or Kilawa as early DPS units, or Bulma for farming.
- Kilawa is recommended for easy evolution via merchant essences.
- Mega can carry through normal and nightmare story stages if obtained.

<YouTubeEmbed videoId="ZvmQIfMkvN8" title="Anime Paradox Beginner’s Guide – FAST Progression, Meta Tier List & Gem Farming!" />

When selecting your first units, focus on a balanced team that includes a strong Damage Per Second (DPS) unit, a reliable farmer, and potentially a support unit. These foundational units will be the backbone of your early progression.

<CardGrid cols={3}>
  <Card title="Core DPS">
    - **Broly**: Excellent AoE damage, great for clearing waves.
    - **Kilawa**: Strong single-target boss killer with stun.
    - **Cell**: Underrated tank with easy evolution, good for story.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Essential Farmers">
    - **Bulma**: The best farm unit in the game, critical for gold.
    - **Speed Wagon**: A solid alternative if Bulma is unavailable.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Valuable Support">
    - **Oraheime**: The best raw healer, crucial for unit survivability.
    - **Idol**: Offers a good balance of damage buff and minor healing.
  </Card>
</CardGrid>

<Callout type="tip" title="Early Trait Advice">
Do not stress over perfect traits in the very early game. Even a "Blessing" trait can be sufficient to clear initial story content. Save your precious trait rerolls for later, when you acquire truly powerful units.
</Callout>

</Section>

<Section icon={Map} title="Mastering Early Progression: Story, Challenges & Nightmare">

After securing your initial units, your primary objective should be to push through the story mode. Completing story stages on both Normal and Nightmare difficulties is the most lucrative way to earn gems early on, as first-time clears offer substantial rewards. Story progression also unlocks crucial game features such as Challenges, Nightmare difficulty, and Legend stages, which are vital for long-term growth.

<Callout type="warning" title="Progression Pitfall">
Attempting Nightmare mode too early without at least two evolved Mythic units can significantly slow your progress. Focus on evolving your core units before tackling harder difficulties to ensure efficient clears.
</Callout>

The progression path in Anime Paradox is structured to guide players through increasingly rewarding content. Following these steps will ensure you make the most of your early game.

<Steps>
  <Step num="1" title="Complete Normal Story">
    Clear all acts of Leaf Village, Planet Namek, and Dark Hollow on Normal difficulty. This provides significant first-clear gems and unlocks Nightmare mode and Challenges.
  </Step>
  <Step num="2" title="Tackle Challenges">
    Focus on Quick, Daily, and Weekly Challenges. These are excellent sources of evolution materials, trait rerolls, gold, and essences, often easier than story stages.
  </Step>
  <Step num="3" title="Conquer Nightmare Story">
    With 2 evolved Mythic units, proceed to clear all acts of the story on Nightmare difficulty. This offers even greater first-clear gem rewards and prepares you for Legend stages.
  </Step>
  <Step num="4" title="Unlock Legend Stages">
    After clearing Nightmare, Legend Stages become accessible. These are crucial for consistent gem and gold farming, and for acquiring the secret unit Ichigo.
  </Step>
</Steps>

Here's a breakdown of gem rewards from various first-time clears:

| Stage Type          | Gems (First Clear) | Notes                                    |
| :------------------ | :----------------- | :--------------------------------------- |
| Normal Story Stages | **250** per stage  | Essential for initial gem boost          |
| Nightmare Stages    | **500** per stage  | Higher reward, requires evolved units    |
| Legend Stages       | **1,000** per stage| Significant gem income, unlocks Ichigo   |
| Raid Act 1          | **1,500**          | Challenging, part of endgame progression |
| Raid Act 2          | **1,500**          | Requires strong team, high reward        |
| Raid Act 3          | **3,000**          | Extremely difficult, highest single clear|

</Section>

<Section icon={Trophy} title="Efficient Resource Management: Gems, Gold & Essences">

Sustaining your progress in Anime Paradox requires a steady flow of resources. Efficiently farming gems, gold, and evolution essences is key to upgrading your units and tackling tougher challenges.

<Callout type="info" title="Ichigo: The Easiest Secret Unit">
**Ichigo is the most accessible secret unit** in Anime Paradox and a game-changer for beginners. You can farm him from **Legend Stages** with a favorable 2% drop rate. Prioritize getting Ichigo once you have 2 evolved Mythic units, as he will significantly boost your progression.
</Callout>

Knowing where to focus your farming efforts will save you considerable time and accelerate your team's development.

Sustaining your progress in Anime Paradox requires a steady flow of resources. Efficiently farming gems, gold, and evolution essences is key to upgrading your units and tackling tougher challenges.

<Callout type="info" title="Ichigo: The Easiest Secret Unit">

</Callout>

Knowing where to focus your farming efforts will save you considerable time and accelerate your team's development.

                                                                                                                                                                               **Anime Paradox Beginner - **Redeem codes** immediately for a strong start and early gems.

- Farm **Legend Stages** for consistent gems, gold, and the easily obtainable secret unit **Ichigo**.
- Save **trait rerolls** exclusively for your best units, especially Ichigo, once acquired.
- Actively play stages to **level up units** efficiently, avoiding feeding for XP.
- Utilize **daily and weekly challenges** for crucial evolution materials and rerolls.

<Section icon={Map} title="Mastering Early Progression: Story, Challenges & Nightmare">
